title: Segmented cache ASR evaluation
created_from: Follow-up from long-dictation cumulative recompute limitations and segment-budget pilot

follow_ups.title: Implement service-side segmented cache runtime
follow_ups.reason: The evaluation harness shows segmented finalization is feasible and avoids whole-session recompute for longer dictation, but App integration needs a separate service/runtime spec with durable audio cache, segment commit, final merge, cancellation, and recovery semantics.

follow_ups.title: Run broader natural long-speech segment sweep
follow_ups.reason: The validated matrix includes three local natural-ish long cases up to 81s and one synthetic 244s stress case; product thresholds still need more natural long speech and repeat runs.
